case_title: TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS, INC. VS. VINCENT CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-09-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE: SC-103. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VINCENT CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
